title: Spruce Health - Dermatology Practice Platform
problem: Dermatology practices need modern patient communication and telemedicine tools integrated with practice workflows.
solution: Comprehensive platform for dermatology practices combining telemedicine, secure patient messaging, and practice management tools.
technology: Telemedicine platform, secure messaging, practice management, EHR integration
varden_fit: HIGH - Telemedicine + practice management for specialty aligns well with Varden's platform approach.
notes: Dermatology-specific platform. Good model for specialty practice coordination.
